title: My children's grandchildren will say she changed everything
subtitle: An affirmation for claiming your role as the start of the new family money story.
excerpt: A short affirmation for when the legacy you are building feels too distant to be real. Say it in the morning as a daily claim on the direction you are heading.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 13 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: An affirmation for the long view. The statement skips past tomorrow's bank balance and lands on what the decision you are making right now will mean to people who are not yet born.
This affirmation works because it is specific enough to feel true without requiring anything to have happened yet. You are already making the decision; the decision is already real.
My children's grandchildren will say she changed everything.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart. Let it sit for a breath between each repetition. If a phrase doesn't feel like you, change it, the version that lands will be close to this one.
Adapted from Day 13 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
